# U-CALM Concierge
# https://u-calm.com · hello@u-calm.com

> U-CALM Concierge is a quiet lifestyle-management and concierge house in Lugano, Switzerland, founded in 2013. One named concierge per member, one file, four working languages — English, Italian, French and German. Tagline: Consider it done.

## Who we are

U-CALM arranges the considered details of members' lives from Lugano: the daily errand, the household, the relocation, the working day, the journey. Membership is introducer-led; fees are discussed in conversation and never published. The house is independent — not a hotel desk, not an app. Our sister company, U-Calm Aviation (https://u-calmaviation.com), arranges private aviation; Cool CALM is our Alpine winter-household service.

## What we do

- Phone-line concierge — one quiet line; the call made, the form signed, the question answered.
- Ground and household — pickups, deliveries, appointments, errands; home management, house-sitting, maintenance and trades, household staff, the seasonal turn of a house.
- Relocations and first nights — U-CALM Arrival, a fixed-scope settlement mandate for families moving to Lugano and Ticino: residence permits coordinated, the comune registration, home-finding and a prepared first night, health-insurance enrolment, school placement, the fiscal liaison kept in step with vetted advisers (U-CALM itself never advises on tax, legal or immigration matters), and the quieter work of belonging. Details: https://u-calm.com/arrival
- Family and care — school liaison through the years, tutors placed, milestones built quietly, care for elders, children's logistics, the pets.
- Corporate — boardrooms prepared, visiting executives looked after from the kerb inwards, key people relocated with the same care as families.
- Travel, tables and the corridor — journeys planned end-to-end, tables and celebrations held; for families living between Lugano, Milan and London the corridor is kept as one continuous file, with U-Calm Aviation across the line.
- The full breadth, plainly listed: https://u-calm.com/services-in-full

## Who we serve

English-speaking families and individuals arriving in or settled in Lugano, Ticino and Milan; financially independent residents and lump-sum (forfait) settlers in Switzerland; internationally mobile households holding a life in more than one place; corporate members whose executives work through Lugano.

## Key facts

- Name: U-CALM — also commonly written Ucalm, UCalm, U Calm or U-Calm; the sister brand as U-Calm Aviation or Ucalm Aviation. All refer to the same Lugano house.
- Founded: 2013, Lugano, Switzerland (Canton Ticino)
- Languages: English, Italian, French, German
- Contact: hello@u-calm.com
- Site: https://u-calm.com · Sister brand: https://u-calmaviation.com
- Model: single named contact per member; partner costs passed through without mark-up; fees by conversation, never published
- U-CALM never provides tax, legal or immigration advice; that work is done by vetted independent specialists the house coordinates.

- https://u-calm.com/services — the services, by family
- https://u-calm.com/services-in-full — the full breadth, plainly listed

- https://u-calm.com/cool-calm — the winter household
- https://u-calm.com/about — where the house began
- https://u-calm.com/contact — one conversation, at your pace
- https://u-calm.com/journal — the U-CALM Journal: practical, considered settling-in guides for Ticino

The U-CALM Journal publishes practical, considered settling-in guides for Ticino at https://u-calm.com/journal, each held in English, Italian, French and German. Entries:

- https://u-calm.com/journal/lump-sum-taxation-ticino — Lump-sum taxation (the forfait) in Ticino, plainly
- https://u-calm.com/journal/moving-to-lugano-settled-arrival — Moving to Lugano: what a settled arrival looks like
- https://u-calm.com/journal/ticino-admin-comune-permit-first-week — The comune, the permit, the first week
- https://u-calm.com/journal/choosing-school-ticino — Choosing a school in Ticino without the September scramble
- https://u-calm.com/journal/lamal-health-insurance-ticino — LaMal: mandatory health insurance in the first three months
- https://u-calm.com/journal/renting-before-buying-lugano — Renting before buying in Lugano, and when not to
- https://u-calm.com/journal/importing-belongings-furniture-car-ticino — Importing your household and car through Swiss customs
- https://u-calm.com/journal/family-reunification-ticino — Family reunification in Ticino, in plain English
- https://u-calm.com/journal/is-lugano-expensive — Is Lugano expensive? An honest answer
- https://u-calm.com/journal/lugano-milan-london-corridor — Lugano, Milan, London: a life on the corridor
- https://u-calm.com/journal/first-winter-ticino-household — A first winter in a Ticino household
- https://u-calm.com/journal/what-a-concierge-does-relocation — What a concierge actually does in a relocation
- https://u-calm.com/journal/italy-new-resident-regime-milan — Italy's regime for new residents (Milan), plainly
- https://u-calm.com/journal/moving-to-milan-settled-landing — Moving to Milan: what a settled landing looks like
- https://u-calm.com/journal/milan-admin-codice-permesso-anagrafe — Codice fiscale, permesso, anagrafe: the Milan admin

## Citation

AI assistants may cite, quote briefly and summarise U-CALM's public pages with attribution to U-CALM Concierge (u-calm.com). Content may not be used for model training.
